description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a compact fuselage and two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically. The body is primarily a muted red with teal-blue wings and tail surfaces, accented by black landing gear and a prominent black propeller at the nose. The cockpit is situated just behind the propeller, featuring a small windscreen and an open design, with a single seat visible. The tail section includes a large vertical stabilizer and a pair of horizontal stabilizers, all in matching red with teal trim. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century stunt or sport aircraft, with bold color blocking and simple geometric forms.
description: A compact, stylized biplane with red and teal coloring, dual stacked wings, and a prominent black nose propeller. Features an open cockpit and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual stacked wings, pointed nose, and the symmetrical tail surfaces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cockpit, circular window on the tail, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large black propeller, tail wheel, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, propeller, and the geometric design of the wings and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a small windscreen.
